Fact.Name: Foreign tax credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 1. Foreign tax credit. Attach Form 1116 if required.

Fact.Name: Child and dependent care credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 2. Credit for child and dependent care expenses from Form 2441, line 11.

Fact.Name: Education credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 3. Education credits from Form 8863, line 19.

Fact.Name: Retirement savings contributions credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 4. Retirement savings contributions credit. Attach Form 8880.

Fact.Name: Residential clean energy credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 5a. Residential clean energy credit from Form 5695, line 15.

Fact.Name: Energy efficient home improvement credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 5b. Energy efficient home improvement credit from Form 5695, line 32.

Fact.Name: General business credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6a. General business credit. Attach Form 3800.

Fact.Name: Credit for prior year minimum tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6b. Credit for prior year minimum tax. Attach Form 8801.

Fact.Name: Adoption credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6c. Adoption credit. Attach Form 8839.

Fact.Name: Credit for the elderly or disabled
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6d. Credit for the elderly or disabled. Attach Schedule R.

Fact.Name: Clean vehicle credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6f. Clean vehicle credit. Attach Form 8936.

Fact.Name: Mortgage interest credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6g. Mortgage interest credit. Attach Form 8396.

Fact.Name: DC first-time homebuyer credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6h. District of Columbia first-time homebuyer credit. Attach Form 8859.

Fact.Name: Qualified electric vehicle credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6i. Qualified electric vehicle credit. Attach Form 8834.

Fact.Name: Alternative fuel vehicle refueling property credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6j. Alternative fuel vehicle refueling property credit. Attach Form 8911.

Fact.Name: Credit to holders of tax credit bonds
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6k. Credit to holders of tax credit bonds. Attach Form 8912.

Fact.Name: Form 8978 credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6l. Amount on Form 8978, line 14.

Fact.Name: Credit for previously owned clean vehicles
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6m. Credit for previously owned clean vehicles. Attach Form 8936.

Fact.Name: Other nonrefundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 6z. Other nonrefundable credits. List type and amount.

Fact.Name: Total other nonrefundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 7. Add lines 6a through 6z.

Fact.Name: Total nonrefundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 8. Add lines 1 through 4, 5a, 5b, and 7. Enter here and on Form 1040, line 20.

Fact.Name: Net premium tax credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 9. Net premium tax credit. Attach Form 8962.

Fact.Name: Extension payment
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 10. Amount paid with request for extension to file.

Fact.Name: Excess social security tax withheld
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 11. Excess social security and tier 1 RRTA tax withheld.

Fact.Name: Credit for federal tax on fuels
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 12. Credit for federal tax on fuels. Attach Form 4136.

Fact.Name: Form 2439 credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 13a. Form 2439.

Fact.Name: Section 1341 credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 13b. Section 1341 credit for repayment of amounts included in income from earlier years.

Fact.Name: Net elective payment election
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 13c. Net elective payment election amount from Form 3800, Part III, line 6, column (j).

Fact.Name: Deferred net 965 tax liability
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 13d. Deferred amount of net 965 tax liability.

Fact.Name: Other refundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 13z. Other refundable credits.

Fact.Name: Total other payments or refundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 14. Add lines 13a through 13z.

Fact.Name: Total other payments and refundable credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 3 line 15. Add lines 9 through 12 and 14. Enter here and on Form 1040, line 31.
